svg.title: Unified ensemble deepfake detection architecture
svg.desc: Full pipeline from input image through 7 parallel feature streams, attention-weighted fusion, and meta-classifier to final verdict

g.text: F = Σ αi · f̃i softmax over learned context vector

svg.text: Stage 1 All backbones initialised from ImageNet pretrained weights (frozen)
Stage 2 Attention fusion layers trained LR = 1×10⁻³ 50 epochs
Stage 3 Meta-classifier MLP trained LR = 5×10⁻⁴ 30 epochs
